title: York High School proud of their matric class of 2024
description: GEORGE NEWS - York High School achieved a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - York High School achieved a 98.9% pass rate, the same as the two previous years.

Headmaster Francois Moll said they are excited and particularly proud of the Class of 2024.


> "This group stood out and showed resilience. They started during Covid and they have been through tough times, but had passed and done well. Congratulations to all of you," said Moll.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
